title: Stockholm Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Stockholm with a Z-Score of -3.54. The city is experiencing extremely cold temperatures.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stockholm are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a Level of CRITICAL. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 13.4 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 59% and the wind speed is at 7.2 km/h, making the cold even more bitter.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap
